label: The Ashveil Alcove
description: The Ashveil Alcove serves as the sleeping quarter within Nullglow Reliquary Rooms, cut as a narrow recess behind layered insulation curtains that damp auroral glare and storm-borne grit. A shock-bolted bunk frame is set into slagcrete and scavenged plasteel, with under-berth lockers keyed to the residence’s cable conduits and stanchion grid. Hooded lumen strips sit low and shielded, throwing controlled light across vitrified-stone surfaces scored by constant maintenance against ash intrusion. The ventilation spine passes overhead in an overbuilt duct run, its filter housings dominating the alcove’s upper wall and reinforcing the room’s reliquary character of sealed preservation.
